title: Mutable, non-private fields should not be readonly
description: Mutable, non-private fields should not be "readonly"Analyze your codeintentionality-clearreliabilityBugWhy is this an issue?How can I fix it?More InfoUsing thereadonlykeywordon a field means it can’t be changed after initialization. However, that’s only partly true when applied to collections or arrays. Thereadonlykeyword enforces that another instance can’t be assigned to the field, but it cannot keep the contents from being updated.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.
